# Infrastructure adapters

## Why this folder exists

Protected layer for DB and third-party SDKs. App code imports from here, not raw SDKs scattered in features/.

## What is here

- supabase/ — clients, migrations, edge functions
- drizzle/ — schema, db.ts, migrations

## Rules

- Migrations live here only
- Never commit service-role keys
